startPoint.en: Talk to Rantz, in eastern Feldip Hills.
startPoint.es: Habla con Rantz, al este de las Feldip Hills.

items.name: Feather
items.display: Feathers (100+ to be safe, 25 can be bought during quest for 50 coins)

items.name: Wolf bones
items.display: 4-6 wolf bones (can be obtained during the quest)

items.name: Achey tree logs
items.display: 4-6 achey tree logs (can be obtained during the quest)

rewards.name: Chompy bird
rewards.display: Ability to hunt chompy birds and cook raw chompy

text.en: Talk to Rantz east of Feldip Hills.
text.es: Habla con Rantz al este de las Feldip Hills.

text.en: Chop down two Achey Trees.
text.es: Tala dos Achey Trees.

text.en: Craft ogre arrow shafts from the logs.
text.es: Fabrica astas de flecha de ogro a partir de los troncos.

text.en: Use feathers on the ogre arrow shafts.
text.es: Usa plumas en las astas de flecha de ogro.

text.en: Obtain some wolf bones. There are some wolves just south-west of Rantz, by the swamp.
text.es: Consigue algunos huesos de lobo. Hay lobos justo al suroeste de Rantz, junto al pantano.

text.en: Craft wolf bone arrowheads from the wolf bones.
text.es: Fabrica puntas de flecha de hueso de lobo a partir de los huesos de lobo.

text.en: Be careful not to bury the bones.
text.es: Ten cuidado de no enterrar los huesos.

text.en: Use the wolf bone arrowheads on the shafts.
text.es: Usa las puntas de flecha de hueso de lobo en las astas.

text.en: Use 6 ogre arrows on Rantz.
text.es: Usa 6 flechas de ogro en Rantz.

text.en: Ask Rantz all possible questions.
text.es: Hazle a Rantz todas las preguntas posibles.

chatOptions: 1 How do we make the chompys come?
3 Where do we put the fatsy toadies?
4 What do you mean 'sneaky..sneaky, stick da chompy?'

text.en: Enter the cave north of Rantz.
text.es: Entra en la cueva al norte de Rantz.

text.en: Unlock the Locked Ogre chest in the north-west corner, then search it to receive ogre bellows.
text.es: Abre el cofre de ogro cerrado en la esquina noroeste, luego regístralo para recibir un fuelle de ogro.

text.en: Exit the cave and run a short distance south-west to the swamp.
text.es: Sal de la cueva y corre una corta distancia hacia el suroeste hasta el pantano.

text.en: At the swamp, fill bellows via the swamp bubbles, then bloat 3 nearby swamp toads for 3 bloated toads.
text.es: En el pantano, llena el fuelle con las burbujas del pantano, luego hincha 3 sapos de pantano cercanos para obtener 3 sapos hinchados.

text.en: Remove any Armour/Augmented Armour this will stop you from killing Chompy
text.es: Quítate cualquier armadura/armadura aumentada, ya que esto te impedirá matar al Chompy.

text.en: Talk to Rantz.
text.es: Habla con Rantz.

text.en: Drop a bloated toad where the arrow points and wait for a chompy to appear.
text.es: Deja un sapo hinchado donde señala la flecha y espera a que aparezca un chompy.

text.en: You may need to drop more toads if the bird doesn't spawn.
text.es: Puede que necesites dejar más sapos si el pájaro no aparece.

text.en: Talk to Rantz after the chompy appears.
text.es: Habla con Rantz después de que aparezca el chompy.

text.en: Wait until Rantz has fired his bow and missed the bird, then talk to him.
text.es: Espera hasta que Rantz haya disparado su arco y falle al pájaro, luego habla con él.

text.en: Convince him to let you try shooting the bird instead. He'll give you an ogre bow.
text.es: Convéncelo de que te deje intentar dispararle al pájaro. Te dará un arco de ogro.

chatOptions: 2 Come on, let me have a go...
1 I'm actually quite strong...please let me try.

text.en: Place another toad in the clearing.
text.es: Coloca otro sapo en el claro.

text.en: Alternatively, you can kill the same chompy bird, if it has not left.
text.es: Alternativamente, puedes matar al mismo chompy, si no se ha ido.

text.en: Kill the chompy bird that appears with the ogre bow.
text.es: Mata al chompy que aparece con el arco de ogro.

text.en: Pluck the carcass and take the raw chompy.
text.es: Desplúmalo y coge el chompy crudo.

text.en: Talk to Rantz. Take note of the specific ingredient he wants on the chompy
text.es: Habla con Rantz. Toma nota del ingrediente específico que quiere en el chompy.

text.en: Go back into the cave and talk to Fycie and Bugs. Take note of the specific ingredients they want on the chompy, all are possible but not necessarily needed.
text.es: Vuelve a entrar en la cueva y habla con Fycie y Bugs. Toma nota de los ingredientes específicos que quieren en el chompy; todos son posibles, pero no necesariamente necesarios.

rows: To the west of the swamp where you get the bloated toads, planted near the tomato on a stool, there's a fire and some ogres, right around there. You need to pick them from the ground, because they don't appear on the minimap.
West of onion spawn, on the gnome gliders landing strip in between the fungus (red dot on minimap).
West of the swamp on a stool, in the same area as the onions (red dot on minimap).
On the ground, not too far from the tomatoes or the potatoes.

You can get this south-east of Rantz, east of the place you placed your toad for the bait. Equa leaves are small and green so sometimes they can be hard to see, a way to get around this is to use the red dots on your minimap to pin point the location of the equa leaves.
You can pick a raw potato from a potato plant south-east of Rantz, right beside the equa leaf.

text.en: Obtain the ingredients that they ask for and use the raw chompy on the spit-roast north of Rantz.
text.es: Consigue los ingredientes que piden y usa el chompy crudo en el asador al norte de Rantz.

text.en: In case you forgot the ingredients, using the raw chompy on the spit-roast will list them out.
text.es: Por si olvidaste los ingredientes, usar el chompy crudo en el asador los mostrará en una lista.

text.en: Talk to Rantz.
text.es: Habla con Rantz.

text.en: Quest complete!
text.es: ¡Misión completada!
